style_blocks.unit: Retro 1990s real-time strategy PC game sprite, in the style of classic Command & Conquer and Red Alert era games. 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic with crisp chunky pixels and a clean readable silhouette. Viewed from directly overhead, top-down. Single hard sunlight from the top-left. Muted cold military palette: gunmetal grey-blue armor plating, olive-drab details, weathered battle-worn metal with rivets and panel lines, and bright TEAL (#2EE6D6) accent panels and markings. Subject perfectly centered, filling about 70% of the frame. No text, no watermark, no UI, no frame. The background must be fully transparent empty alpha with absolutely nothing painted around the subject: NO drop shadow, NO cast shadow, NO dark silhouette copy behind or under the subject, NO ground plate — the sprite gets rotated in-engine, so shading on the subject body only.
style_blocks.building: Retro 1990s real-time strategy PC game sprite, in the style of classic Command & Conquer and Red Alert era games. 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic with crisp chunky pixels and a clean readable silhouette. Viewed from directly overhead, top-down at a slight 3/4 angle. Single hard sunlight from the top-left. Muted cold military palette: gunmetal grey-blue armor plating, olive-drab details, weathered battle-worn metal with rivets and panel lines, and bright TEAL (#2EE6D6) accent panels and markings. Subject perfectly centered, filling about 78% of the frame. Plain background. No text, no watermark, no UI, no frame. The structure sits on a weathered square concrete foundation pad whose edges are aligned with the image axes (not rotated), with a subtle short drop shadow toward the bottom-right baked in.
style_blocks.prop: Retro 1990s real-time strategy PC game environment sprite, 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, crisp chunky pixels. Viewed from directly overhead, top-down. Single hard sunlight from the top-left. Muted natural palette that fits a dry steppe battlefield. Subject centered, filling about 72% of the frame. Plain background. No text, no watermark. Strictly NO ground shadow.
style_blocks.terrain: Seamless tileable terrain texture for a retro 1990s real-time strategy PC game, viewed from directly overhead (true top-down orthographic). 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic. Muted, low-contrast, evenly lit with no vignette and no bright hotspots, so game units stay readable on top of it. The texture must tile perfectly: the left and right edges match each other exactly, and the top and bottom edges match each other exactly. No text, no watermark.
style_blocks.cameo: Unit portrait icon for a 2003-era RTS game sidebar, in the exact style of Red Alert 2 cameo icons: a dramatic close-up 3/4 view of the subject filling most of the frame, dark navy-steel gradient background with subtle diagonal tech panel lines, strong warm rim lighting from the top-left, painted military concept-art style with crisp confident brushwork, high contrast and readable at small size. No text, no watermark, no border, no frame.
style_blocks.hifi: Modern high-fidelity real-time strategy game art in the style of 2020s AAA RTS games: painterly realistic military rendering, physically-plausible materials and lighting, volumetric atmosphere, rich micro-detail, desaturated military palette with teal faction accents. Top-down RTS camera angle. No text, no watermark, no UI.

unit_rifle.prompt: One tiny infantry rifleman seen from directly above, standing, holding an assault rifle pointing UP toward 12 o'clock. Helmet and small backpack, gunmetal-blue fatigues, teal shoulder markings. Chunky readable proportions with thick limbs, high contrast.

unit_rocket.prompt: One tiny infantry soldier seen from directly above, standing, aiming a bulky shoulder-mounted rocket launcher tube pointing UP toward 12 o'clock. Dark visor helmet, armored vest with red trim, teal chest marking. Chunky readable proportions with thick limbs, high contrast.

unit_buggy.prompt: A fast military scout attack buggy seen from directly above with its front pointing UP toward 12 o'clock: open-top dune-buggy frame, roll cage, four big knobby off-road tires, a small pintle-mounted machine gun, whip antenna.

unit_harvester.prompt: A heavy ore-harvester truck seen from directly above with its front pointing UP toward 12 o'clock: massive industrial mining vehicle, wide toothed intake scoop at the front, big open-top cargo hopper at the rear filled with glowing golden ore crystals, armored driver cab, chunky wheels.

unit_tank_hull.prompt: A medium battle tank HULL ONLY seen from directly above with its front pointing UP toward 12 o'clock. There is NO turret: instead show a flat circular turret-ring socket recessed at the hull center. Twin parallel tank treads, angular sloped armor plates, rear engine grille, tow hooks.

unit_tank_gun.prompt: A medium tank TURRET ONLY seen from directly above, detached component on a plain background: compact angular armored turret with one long cannon barrel with a muzzle brake pointing UP toward 12 o'clock, closed teal hatch on top. The round turret body sits at the exact center of the frame with the barrel extending upward from it.

unit_heavy_hull.prompt: A super-heavy assault tank HULL ONLY seen from directly above with its front pointing UP toward 12 o'clock. There is NO turret: instead show a flat circular turret-ring socket recessed at the hull center. FOUR parallel tank treads, two on each side, thick layered riveted armor plates, massive and imposing silhouette.

unit_heavy_gun.prompt: A super-heavy tank TURRET ONLY seen from directly above, detached component on a plain background: broad armored turret with TWIN parallel long cannon barrels pointing UP toward 12 o'clock, small teal sensor dome on top. The turret body sits at the exact center of the frame with both barrels extending upward from it.

bld_conyard.prompt: A Construction Yard for a retro RTS: a large industrial construction command facility with a tall yellow gantry crane, a half-built steel frame section, stacked girders and supply crates, floodlight masts, teal accent panels on the main hall.

bld_power.prompt: A Power Plant for a retro RTS: compact fortified power station with two fat cylindrical cooling stacks venting a faint wisp of steam, glowing TEAL energy coils and transformer fins between them, thick power cables running to the pad.

bld_refinery.prompt: An Ore Refinery for a retro RTS: industrial ore-processing plant with one large cylindrical storage silo with a glowing golden ore-level window strip, a smelter block with a glowing furnace vent, external pipes, and an open unloading dock ramp at the front-bottom of the pad sized for a truck to park on.

bld_barracks.prompt: An Infantry Barracks for a retro RTS: a reinforced military bunker-barracks with a sandbagged entrance at the bottom edge, a small muster yard, a tall pole flying a small teal flag, ammo crates and a target dummy.

bld_factory.prompt: A War Factory for a retro RTS: a big armored vehicle assembly plant with a wide roll-up bay door at the bottom front marked with yellow-black hazard stripes, overhead crane rails on the roof, a faint welding-spark glow from inside the slightly open door, ventilation stacks.

bld_radar.prompt: A Radar Dome station for a retro RTS: reinforced bunker base with a large white geodesic radome dome and a separate small rotating dish antenna mounted beside it, blinking teal status lights, cable conduits.

bld_turret.prompt: A defensive gun turret BASE PLATFORM ONLY for a retro RTS, no gun mounted: a small round armored turret socket ring with bolts on a square concrete pad, low profile, a few sandbags at the corners.

bld_turret_gun.prompt: An anti-tank gun turret HEAD ONLY seen from directly above, detached component on a plain background: armored gun mount housing with one heavy cannon barrel with muzzle brake pointing UP toward 12 o'clock, teal targeting sensor. The mount body sits at the exact center of the frame with the barrel extending upward.

prop_ore1.prompt: A dense cluster of jagged glowing GOLDEN-AMBER ore crystals growing out of cracked ground, seen from directly above. Bright warm inner glow, sharp faceted edges.

prop_ore2.prompt: A small sparse cluster of jagged glowing GOLDEN-AMBER ore crystals, a few separate shards, seen from directly above. Warm inner glow, sharp faceted edges.

prop_tree1.prompt: A single hardy steppe tree seen from directly above: a roughly circular canopy of dark olive-green foliage with rust-orange autumn patches, hints of branches radiating from the center. The sprite must be isolated on a fully transparent background: absolutely NO ground patch, NO soil square, NO grass tile, NO terrain of any kind painted under or around the subject — only the subject itself with empty transparency around it.

prop_tree2.prompt: A single windswept dry steppe tree seen from directly above: a sparse irregular canopy of dusty olive and rust-brown foliage, visible gnarled branches radiating from the center. The sprite must be isolated on a fully transparent background: absolutely NO ground patch, NO soil square, NO grass tile, NO terrain of any kind painted under or around the subject — only the subject itself with empty transparency around it.

prop_rock.prompt: A tight cluster of grey weathered boulders seen from directly above, sharp top-left highlights, cool grey tones with subtle moss hints. The sprite must be isolated on a fully transparent background: absolutely NO ground patch, NO soil square, NO grass tile, NO terrain of any kind painted under or around the subject — only the subject itself with empty transparency around it.

ter_grass.prompt: Dry steppe grassland: muted olive-tan dead grass with subtle darker patches, sparse tiny stones and grass tufts.

ter_dirt.prompt: Cracked dry earth and packed mud, medium-dark brown, with fine even crack patterns and small pebbles distributed uniformly. No long straight lines, no ruts, no band patterns — uniform organic texture across the whole image.

ter_water.prompt: Deep dark slate-blue open water with subtle low-contrast wave ripples and faint foam flecks.

title_art.prompt: Retro 1990s PC strategy video game box art in gritty airbrushed painted style: a dramatic blood-red horizon at dusk over a scorched steppe battlefield. On the left, silhouettes of advancing heavy battle tanks with glowing teal headlights and teal squad markings; on the right, looming crimson enemy armor and a radar dome silhouette. Dark storm clouds, embers and smoke in the air, dramatic rim lighting. Bold cinematic composition with calmer open sky space at the top center reserved for a title logo. Absolutely NO text, NO letters, NO logos, NO watermark anywhere in the image.

unit_builder.prompt: A compact military engineering construction vehicle seen from directly above with its front pointing UP toward 12 o'clock: tracked bulldozer-like chassis, a small crane arm folded along one side, yellow-and-black hazard stripes across the gunmetal body, teal accent panels, an amber warning beacon light on the cab roof.

site_frame.prompt: An under-construction building site for a retro RTS, viewed top-down at a slight 3/4 angle: a skeletal steel girder frame with scaffolding poles rising from a weathered square concrete foundation pad, stacked I-beams, wooden crates, a small cement mixer, yellow caution stripes on barriers, sparse and clearly unfinished — mostly open framework.

bld_repair.prompt: A Repair Platform for a retro RTS: a small square maintenance pad with a folding crane arm, hydraulic lift rails, tool racks, yellow-black hazard striping and a teal diagnostic screen, open flat center where a vehicle parks.

cameo_bld_repair.prompt: A military vehicle repair platform with a crane arm and hydraulic lifts, sparks flying from a welding torch.

unit_artillery.prompt: A self-propelled rocket artillery vehicle seen from directly above with its front pointing UP toward 12 o’clock: a tracked chassis carrying a rectangular multi-tube rocket launcher rack (3x2 tubes visible from above) angled slightly backward, thin armor, teal accent stripes.

bld_tesla.prompt: An advanced Tesla-style lightning defense tower for a retro RTS: a tall slender pylon on a small square concrete pad, crowned with a glowing TEAL energy orb between two curved electrode prongs, thick cables coiling down the shaft, crackling with faint electric arcs.

bld_silo.prompt: A strategic missile silo building for a retro RTS: a heavy square blast-door hatch set into a reinforced concrete pad, the hatch panels slightly parted revealing a red-tipped missile nose cone inside, warning stripes around the rim, small radar mast and floodlights at the corners.

cameo_unit_artillery.prompt: A tracked multi-tube rocket artillery vehicle mid-salvo, rockets streaking skyward with fire trails.

cameo_bld_tesla.prompt: A tall tesla lightning tower with a glowing teal orb crackling with electric arcs.

cameo_bld_silo.prompt: A missile silo with blast doors parting, a red-tipped strategic missile rising amid steam and floodlights.

bld_wall.prompt: A single modular fortified wall segment for a retro RTS, one tile square: thick reinforced concrete block wall with steel plating cap, rivets and a teal hazard light strip, viewed top-down at a slight 3/4 angle, designed to visually connect seamlessly with identical neighboring segments on left and right.

bld_shield.prompt: A shield generator building for a retro RTS: a compact reinforced base housing a large glowing TEAL crystal emitter ring held by three curved prongs, humming with faint energy, thick power cables, small cooling fins.

unit_fieldgun.prompt: A towed heavy field gun (artillery piece) seen from directly above with the long barrel pointing UP toward 12 o'clock: split-trail carriage legs spread toward the bottom, two rubber wheels at the sides, armored gun shield plate near the breech, gunmetal with teal markings.

unit_hovercraft.prompt: A military hovercraft troop transport seen from directly above with its front pointing UP toward 12 o'clock: a wide flat rectangular deck with an inflated black rubber skirt all around, twin rear ducted fans, an open troop bay in the middle, gunmetal armor with teal stripes.

cameo_bld_wall.prompt: A massive fortified concrete and steel wall line stretching into the distance, battle-scarred.

cameo_bld_shield.prompt: A glowing teal energy shield dome projected over military structures by a crystal emitter.

hifi_test_tank.prompt: A modern main battle tank on cracked steppe terrain, viewed from a top-down RTS camera at about 60 degrees, dust on its tracks, teal squad markings, photoreal painterly game-art quality.

hifi_test_base.prompt: A military base cluster (construction yard, power plant with glowing teal coils, ore refinery) on dry steppe, viewed from a top-down RTS camera, long soft shadows, volumetric dust, painterly AAA RTS quality.

hifi_test_terrain.prompt: Seamless-looking dry steppe battlefield terrain with subtle tire tracks, scattered rocks, dry grass tufts and a shallow water inlet, viewed from directly above, AAA RTS ground-texture quality, even lighting.
